---
pagetitle: INTERLIS Transformer
page-layout: custom
search: false
toc: false
css: index.css
---

::: {.hero-banner}
# <span class="hero-title-interlis">INTERLIS</span> Transformer

## Modellbewusste Transformation für INTERLIS-Daten.

[Get started](erste_schritte.qmd){.btn .btn-action .btn-action-primary role="button"}
:::

::: {.preview-wrap}
![INTERLIS Transformer Mapping-Vorschau](assets/img/ilimap-placeholder.svg){.preview-image}
:::
